criteria.label: Payoff concreteness
criteria.notes: Names fib(50), >2 trillion calls, exactly 50 unique calls, ~10^11 speedup. All quantified.

criteria.label: Staircase coherence
criteria.notes: Six rungs build cleanly. Minor: optimal substructure for Fibonacci is trivial (no maximization).

criteria.label: Destination precision
criteria.notes: Names both conditions, mechanism, complexity outcome.

criteria.label: Narration clarity
criteria.notes: All symbols defined. Minor: 'polynomial time' invoked without grounding why O(n) is polynomial vs exponential.

criteria.label: Board specificity
criteria.notes: Tree, memo table, sweep all specific. Minor: bottom-center region used by two items.

criteria.label: Board coherence
criteria.notes: Largely coherent. Two issues: tree erased at t=260 removes primary anchor as lesson closes; memo_table and tabulation_sweep both occupy bottom-center.

criteria.label: Board visual balance
criteria.notes: Three visual constructs (tree, memo table, sweep). Good for algorithmic topic.

criteria.label: Math and notation correctness
criteria.notes: Recurrence correct. fib(50) >2 trillion is FACTUALLY WRONG -- actual naive call count is ~1.2x10^10 (~12 billion), not 2 trillion. Error in payoff.

criteria.label: Code-content decision
criteria.notes: lru_cache snippet syntactically valid, placed at right beat.

criteria.label: Pacing and density
criteria.notes: Eleven beats over 270s, ~24s/beat. Final beat at 220s leaves 50s before durationSeconds with only board actions.

criteria.label: Redundancy and focus
criteria.notes: Stays focused. Two-condition restatement is intentional capstone.

topThreeIssues: Payoff statistic is factually wrong: naive fib(50) makes ~2x10^10 calls (~20 billion), not '>2 trillion' -- propagates into payoff, narration, and board write at t=35
memo_table and tabulation_sweep both assigned region bottom-center, creating layout collision -- shift one to bottom-right
fib5_tree erased at t=260 with 10s remaining -- primary visual anchor removed during closing summary
summary: Strong plan with clear staircase and correct executable code. Critical fix: factual arithmetic error in payoff -- fib(50) is ~20 billion calls, not 2 trillion. Two minor layout issues.
